cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2500U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes:
My concluding notes are to check ProtonDB before buying any more games from Steam since I'm using Linux.

PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command% actually cause the game to load a black screen momentarily before crashing with no error popups. I was really hoping this game would work since I shelled out $50 for it.

I have also tried AMD_VULKAN_ICD=RADV PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 WINE_FULLSCREEN_FSR=1 WINE_FULLSCREEN_FSR_STRENGTH=0.2 RADV_PERFTEST=nggc VK_INSTANCE_LAYERS=VK_LAYER_MESA_overlay mesa_glthread=true gamemoderun %command% because it's what I use with every other game and that works for the majority of them.
